brief: Legs B tonight — first build week, so the calibration discount is over. Smith RDL: same ramp to 205, fight for 8s and take the full three-minute rests (your last set died at 7 on the 15th). Leg press: I made all three work sets 160 — your 120 opener was really a warm-up. Calves: one ramp set at 240, then three real sets at 280 with a dead-stop pause at the bottom; you proved 260×15 twice on Saturday. Cable crunch moves up to 50, which you already handled Saturday. Get all four leg-curl sets in this time. And fit one more easy 20–30 minute cardio session in before Sunday.

flags.note: Leg curls and calf presses have come up short of their planned sets two sessions running — bank every set tonight.

overrides.reason: Your 120 opener was a warm-up in disguise — three real sets at 160, build toward 12s.
You proved 260×15 twice on Saturday — one ramp set, then three real sets at 280. Pause at the bottom.
